title: Dramatic Black FIFA World Cup Poster
sourceTitle: Fifa World Cup Last Dance Black White Portrait Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic FIFA World Cup 2026 farewell poster for PORTUGAL NUMBER SEVEN, built around a black-and-white cinematic hero portrait and THE LAST DANCE title. Subject: PORTUGAL NUMBER SEVEN stares directly into the camera with intense eyes, fingers touching red and green Portugal flag paint streaks, hyper-detailed skin texture, sweat, pores, and legendary final-tournament emotion. Scene: Dark stadium background fading into black with powerful emotional atmosphere, selective national flag color, and award-winning sports documentary mood. Composition: Fixed centered symmetrical portrait, face dominating upper half, massive bold serif THE LAST DANCE occupying lower half, player name above title, farewell lines and FIFA WORLD CUP 2026 below. Signature Elements: Direct eye contact, face paint touch, selective national flag color, dark stadium, massive serif title, farewell copy, FIFA World Cup 2026 text, ESPN x Netflix sports-poster mood. Style: Ultra-realistic sports portrait, high-contrast monochrome grading, ESPN x Netflix poster aesthetic, professional sports photography, luxury documentary campaign, and iconic hero-poster design. Color Palette: Fixed black-and-white monochrome base with only red and green Portugal flag paint streaks kept vibrant; deep shadows, white cinematic typography, and restrained stadium highlights. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting, subtle glowing eyes, deep shadows, sweat highlights, and high-contrast documentary portrait exposure. Typography: PORTUGAL NUMBER SEVEN appears above the title; THE LAST DANCE appears as the huge lower-half title; ONE LAST TOURNAMENT. ONE LAST DREAM. and FIFA WORLD CUP 2026 appear below. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
